metaDescription: Browse houses, apartments and new construction listings for sale in Germany. Map view, filters, favorites & compare – localized for DE/EN.

hero.title: Find your next home — with map, filters & compare
hero.subtitle: Discover houses, apartments and new builds. Save favorites, compare listings and move faster towards the right choice.
hero.note: Note: Listing data may vary depending on the source.

quickBox.title: Quick start
quickBox.text: Jump to popular sections or start with the map and filters.
quickBox.tipText: Pick city + budget first, then bedrooms & size. You’ll get better results instantly.

valueCards.title: Why MyHome24App?
valueCards.subtitle: A modern, fast home search — clean, localized and packed with tools that actually help.

items.title: Map & split view
items.text: Keep location, pricing and context in view without constant switching.

items.title: Strong filters
items.text: Filter by price, type, size, bedrooms and more — in seconds.

items.title: Compare & insights
items.text: Compare listings and spot differences instantly (export included).

items.title: Trust & safety
items.text: Clean UX, consistent data and a focus on safe flows.

mapSection.title: Buy: map & results
mapSection.subtitle: Zoom into cities/regions, apply your filters and open details directly from the map.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Quick answers to the most common questions about buying property.

items.q: How do I find the best listings?
items.a: Start with city/region and budget. Then use filters like type, bedrooms and size. Save favorites and compare later.
Yes. Add favorites and use the compare feature to quickly see differences (price/size/features).
Use the calculator or submit a request to financing partners.

bottomCta.title: Ready for the next step?
bottomCta.text: Start on the map or check your financing — fast and clear.
bottomCta.note: MyHome24App provides guidance. Please consult professionals for final decisions.
